description_long: This is a plush, dual-seat recliner sofa upholstered in a soft, light gray fabric. The seating area is divided into two generously padded sections, each with its own high backrest and wide, cushioned armrests. A central console separates the two seats, featuring cup holders and a padded armrest for added convenience. The backrests are segmented, providing distinct headrest and lumbar support zones for ergonomic comfort. The overall form is rounded and inviting, with visible stitching outlining the seat and backrest panels. The recliner appears sturdy and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A light gray, dual-seat recliner sofa with plush padding, segmented backrests, and a central console with cup holders. The design is soft, inviting, and ergonomically contoured.
description_view_0: Front view showing two padded seats, segmented backrests, wide armrests, and a central console with cup holders.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, cushioned armrest, the depth of the seat, and the layered backrest structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the subtle segmentation of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest, the seat depth, and the profile of the central console.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, thickly padded, and smoothly contoured, covered in the same soft gray fabric as the rest of the recliner. They feature a seamless, rounded design with no visible seams or hardware.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into multiple sections, with distinct headrest and lumbar support areas for each seat, providing ergonomic comfort.
